alignments.candidate_evidence: Candidate has ~8 years at Google Devices and Services with two promotions in Strategy and Operations / Product Operations, but not in product design or consumer-facing design leadership roles
alignments.job_requirement: 8+ years of experience in product design with a proven track record in consumer-facing products, including two years in a lead capacity

alignments.candidate_evidence: Candidate demonstrates end-to-end ownership and program leadership through transformation initiatives and global commercial operations at Google, but ownership is in operations and transformation execution, not product design
alignments.job_requirement: Take end-to-end ownership of design in your product team, shaping direction and delivering high-quality, hands-on work

alignments.candidate_evidence: Cross-functional collaboration is core to candidate's Strategy and Operations background, though experience is with business stakeholders and operations partners rather than product design teams
alignments.job_requirement: Partner closely with product managers, engineers, and AI specialists to align on priorities, user needs, technical feasibility, and business impact

gaps.gap: Core expertise in product design, UX/UI, interaction design, and visual design. Role requires 8+ years of product design experience; candidate background is Strategy and Operations / Product Operations with no demonstrated product design portfolio, design system work, or visual/interaction design credentials
gaps.mitigation: Candidate would need to demonstrate a portfolio of consumer-facing product design work or begin a major career transition into product design, which is not feasible for a Staff-level design leadership role

gaps.gap: Multimodal experience design (voice, chat, graphical interfaces). Role explicitly requires strong expertise in designing across voice, chat, and mobile; candidate's background is operations and business transformation, not multimodal UX design
gaps.mitigation: No clear mitigation path without substantial hands-on design experience in conversational AI or multimodal interfaces

gaps.gap: Design research and usability testing leadership. Role requires research-driven mindset with user research, usability testing, and data-informed design decisions; candidate's expertise is in operational metrics and transformation, not design validation
gaps.mitigation: Would require building entirely new competency area in design research methodologies

gaps.gap: Consumer product design portfolio and track record. Staff-level design role requires a strong portfolio demonstrating elegant, user-centered consumer-facing solutions; no evidence of this in candidate profile
gaps.mitigation: Portfolio is essential for Staff designer roles and cannot be quickly acquired

output.summary: This is a Staff Product Designer role requiring 8+ years of product design expertise, multimodal UX/UI specialization, and consumer-facing design leadership. Candidate is a Strategy and Operations leader from Google with transformation and program ownership scope, but has no product design background, design portfolio, or multimodal experience design credentials. Function fit is fundamentally misaligned; this is not a viable transition path.
